expectations.text: Has a clearly labeled Task section
Has a Why-this-matters section citing Epic 3 critical path
Pastes developer's prior 2 reports verbatim (not paraphrased)
Explicitly states TLS verification must stay on
Instructs researcher to message developer directly / no relay
Names knowledge sources: package.json and architecture.md
Invokes at least one relevant skill
Uses Delegation Packet structure (≥6 of 8 labeled slots)
